title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
summary: Contributed to a medical-practice CRM with Next.js SSR, Playwright automation, SEO improvements, and Python migration tooling.
highlights: Contributed to a medical-practice CRM built with Next.js SSR and TypeScript.
Implemented test automation with Playwright and added SEO-friendly pages.
Introduced Google Tag Manager for reporting and event tracking.
Built a document template generator that reduced support needs and saved internal development time.
Authored Python migration scripts to streamline data updates and maintain system reliability.
manual_highlights: Worked in Linux environments while developing and supporting production healthcare software systems.

manual_notes.note: User confirmed Linux experience at InteroCloud.

source.notes: Parsed from JOSE BANDE SERRANO RESUME V6.pdf
